client.name: Colorado HVAC Outreach
client.description: Colorado-based construction, HVAC, and mechanical companies

icp.q_keywords: construction OR HVAC OR mechanical OR plumbing OR sheet metal OR heating OR cooling

qualification.ideal_customer_description: A Colorado construction/HVAC/mechanical company with 10-500 employees whose leadership is open to technology but hasn't fully adopted AI yet. Companies still using manual processes, spreadsheets, or outdated software score higher.
qualification.service_focus: AI workflow automation for scheduling, dispatching, estimating, inventory management, and customer communications

custom_guidelines: Do NOT use phrases like 'I hope this email finds you well'
Reference specific construction/HVAC pain points like scheduling crews, managing estimates, or tracking inventory
